Id1.text: Abilene, Texas is 524 above sea level, is 286.5 square kilometres large and has 429.9 people per square kilometre.

Id2.text: Abilene, Texas; is 524m above sea level, has a total area of 286.5 sq km, and a population density of 429.9 inhabitants per square kilometre.

Id3.text: At 524 metres above sea level, Abilene (Texas) has a total area of 286.5 square kilometres, and a population density of 429.9 inhabitants per square kilometre.
